accepted: one modality as the minimum conforming beacon composition
three replaceable core modality profiles as an optional reference composition
core Observation to Evidence to FusionResult to OperatorAnnotation chain
abstention, unknown and visible missing capabilities
local feature processing and bounded authorized raw capture policy
closed extension and reusable dataset manifest contracts
deterministic safe replay across ten input orders
governed residuals without physical performance claims
not_accepted: physical sensitivity, specificity, range, localization or environmental performance
continuous audio capture, speech transcription, identity or biometric inference
dataset representativeness or real-human capture authorization
hardware selection, calibration, custody or field readiness
automatic presence, absence, victim count, diagnosis or rescue decision
OS-06 or later Open Spec tasks
